summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Training/Formation features. Fixed critical bug in purchase endpoint (stripe_checkout not instantiated). All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified for Homepage trainings section, Enterprise Dashboard training form, and Client Dashboard 'Mes Formations' section with downloadable files.

minor.issue: Old trainings in DB missing 'training_type' field (use 'is_online' boolean instead) - data migration needed for consistency

fixed.issue: stripe_checkout was not instantiated before use - FIXED by adding StripeCheckout initialization

action_items: Consider data migration to add 'training_type' field to old trainings (currently using 'is_online' boolean)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed trainings for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training system fully functional. Stripe integration working for purchases. Client can see downloadable files for online trainings. Enterprise can create both online (with files) and on-site (with dates/location) trainings.

features_verified.homepage_trainings_section: ✓ Shows public trainings with 'S'inscrire' button, redirects to auth if not logged in
features_verified.enterprise_training_form: ✓ Conditional fields for online (downloadable_files) vs on_site (location, dates)
features_verified.enterprise_training_crud: ✓ Create, Read, Update, Delete all working
features_verified.client_mes_formations: ✓ Shows enrollments with tabs (Toutes/En cours/Terminées), stats, progress bar
features_verified.downloadable_files: ✓ Online trainings show downloadable files (PDF, video) in client dashboard
features_verified.enrollment_api: ✓ Creates enrollment with training details and files
